release-1.11"}],"state":"closed","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":4,"created_at":"2024-09-30T17:34:20Z","updated_at":"2024-10-18T08:38:26Z","closed_at":"2024-10-15T03:54:07Z","author_association":"CONTRIBUTOR","active_lock_reason":null,"draft":false,"pull_request":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/pulls/55941","html_url":"https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/pull/55941","diff_url":"https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/pull/55941.diff","patch_url":"https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/pull/55941.patch","merged_at":"2024-10-15T03:54:07Z"},"body":"Currently, it's assumed that the zero element is identical for the matrix, but this is not necessary if the elements are matrices themselves and have different sizes. This PR ensures that `kron` for a `Diagonal` has the correct zero elements.
Current:
```julia
julia> D = Diagonal(1:2)
2×2 Diagonal{Int64, UnitRange{Int64}}:
 1  ⋅
 ⋅  2

julia> B = reshape([ones(2,2), ones(3,2), ones(2,3), ones(3,3)], 2, 2);

julia> size.(kron(D, B))
4×4 Matrix{Tuple{Int64, Int64}}:
 (2, 2)  (2, 3)  (2, 2)  (2, 2)
 (3, 2)  (3, 3)  (2, 2)  (2, 2)
 (2, 2)  (2, 2)  (2, 2)  (2, 3)
 (2, 2)  (2, 2)  (3, 2)  (3, 3)
``` 
This PR
```julia
julia> size.(kron(D, B))
4×4 Matrix{Tuple{Int64, Int64}}:
 (2, 2)  (2, 3)  (2, 2)  (2, 3)
 (3, 2)  (3, 3)  (3, 2)  (3, 3)
 (2, 2)  (2, 3)  (2, 2)  (2, 3)
 (3, 2)  (3, 3)  (3, 2)  (3, 3)
```
Note the differences e.g. in the `CartesianIndex(4,1)`, `CartesianIndex(3,2)` and `CartesianIndex(3,3)` elements.","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/55941/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/55941/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null},"comment":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/comments/2421840884","html_url":"https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/pull/55941#issuecomment-2421840884","issue_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/55941","id":2421840884,"node_id":"IC_kwDOABkWpM6QWlv0","user":{"login":"royess","id":31059422,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjMxMDU5NDIy","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/31059422?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/royess","html_url":"https://github.com/royess","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/royess/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/royess/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/royess/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/royess/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/royess/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/royess/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/royess/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/royess/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/royess/received_events","type":"User","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"created_at":"2024-10-18T08:38:24Z","updated_at":"2024-10-18T08:38:24Z","author_association":"NONE","body":"A MWE would be:

```julia
using Hecke
import LinearAlgebra

GA = group_algebra(GF(2), abelian_group(10))
x = gens(GA)[]
A = [x GA(1); x GA(0)]
B = LinearAlgebra.I(10)
@show kron(B, A)
```

In v1.11.0, it works normally. In v1.11.1, it results in a segmentation fault.
